name: Force Cronet SNI (YouTube arm64)
description: Patches bundled arm64 libcronet so TLS SNI is forced to a configurable hostname in the SSLClientSocket path. URL and HTTP Host remain unchanged.

options.title: Forced SNI hostname
options.description: Hostname written into libcronet and used by the SSLClientSocket path for TLS SNI.

options.title: ytimg SNI hostname
options.description: Hostname used as TLS SNI for i.ytimg.com image and thumbnail requests.

options.title: Forced SNI hostname
options.description: Hostname written into libcronet and used by the SSLClientSocket path for TLS SNI.

options.title: ytimg SNI hostname
options.description: Hostname used as TLS SNI for i.ytimg.com image and thumbnail requests.
